'''Hanging Moss Village''' was inhabited by cruel and vicious [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] on the forest [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. It was an isolated location and its inhabitants were known to [[Torture/Legends|torture]] the creatures they caught.

{{City-stub}}
